title: Build CMMC Shield web application (auth, dashboard, Stripe, UI)
description: Build the web application shell around the compliance engine. Implement: (1) user authentication and company onboarding, (2) main dashboard showing C3PAO readiness score and control family status, (3) interactive gap assessment wizard UI, (4) SSP/POA&M document viewer and export, (5) remediation tracker with status updates, (6) Stripe integration for 3-tier subscription (Starter $99, Pro $199, Team $299/mo), (7) responsive landing page. Output: products/product-0603/src/web/
